mapper.select: select d.*, u.display_name as created_by_name from reply_draft d left join user_account u on d.created_by=u.id where d.application_id=#{applicationId} order by d.created_at desc, d.id desc
select d.*, u.display_name as created_by_name from reply_draft d left join user_account u on d.created_by=u.id where d.id=#{id}
mapper.update: update reply_draft set status=#{status}, audit_remark=#{auditRemark}, used_at=case when #{used} then coalesce(used_at, now()) else used_at end where id=#{id}
